{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032113143361C30DAF61A4941A14DE"}"},"total":1375},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7132118262162162473","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"灰常好看，我觉得吧！没什么大毒点，是个对味的女尊文，就是吧，徒弟和师傅那里我觉得不改有腹肌，不然怪怪的，软软的不香吗？"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1660575744,"group_id":"7092011333645765665","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"哎嘿嘿","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N1G6h+Iqe+jNpornAE5KzYKGj/0LsQc2gnHDfsVgsUOR","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":2,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/51cdc818263941cb8985f97b486ddd11~tplv-obj.image","user_id":"3764355316582478","user_name":"香香兔子肉"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"3764355316582478","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7092011333645765665","book_info":{"abstract":"【多世界女尊文，男主身娇体柔易推倒】
单凌穿着女装结束一天直播的时候，电脑上突然出现弹窗，然后单凌眼前一黑就失去了意识。
当单凌再次醒来的时候，自己被一个系统强行绑定，还要做什么任务。
在单凌还没有反应过来时，自己直接被系统投放到一个武侠女尊世界，单凌穿越的第一天就成为了一名皇帝。
但是单凌越来越觉得不对劲，这个皇帝当的好累，自己手下的人不听话啊.
就这样单凌在重重危险下开启了自己第一个世界的任务。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/91bbac0092558290b1675b6ae8a02f08~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"没有明月光","author_id":"","book_id":"7092011333645765665","book_name":"女尊：穿越成为了千古第一男帝","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#282820","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"4230人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":257,"name":"玄幻脑洞","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=257&name=玄幻脑洞&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":7,"name":"玄幻","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=7&name=玄幻&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":452,"name":"架空","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=452&name=架空&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":511,"name":"东方玄幻","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=511&name=东方玄幻&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7096862051452060160","read_count":"4230","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"604899"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"8.3","serial_count":"299","tags":"玄幻脑洞,玄幻,系统,穿越,架空,东方玄幻","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/91bbac0092558290b1675b6ae8a02f08~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779254073&x-signature=EfOWzgQf1f4yU2TcNWeni9FAcHY%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"747283591732935","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"1.4923707e+07"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032113143361C30DAF61A4941A14DE"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读4小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_co 剧情的精彩程度 我是看的笑嘻嘻的，在被窝里面，但是剧情的衔接，就出现了问题，这也许是本书评分低的原因
例如 穿越者 我们读者读到穿越者的时候 就默认 这个穿越者是 知晓皇宫内的官员平衡机制的，毕竟大家都是中国人，但是明明是穿越者，但是对于皇宫内人员的平衡机制不懂。那这就是毒了，只不过本书的毒点不在我的点，而且我看的也是津津有味。Ծ‸Ծ 作者加油(ง •̀_•́)ง (￣▽￣～)~"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1655133022,"group_id":"7092011333645765665","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"人的成长，就在于你是否知道，人与人的差距比人与猪的差距还要大","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N/6gK6PvKOdU0hn8IylmprcBYeOHo3lLL6ePByyZAsoK","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-0000/0c1e14c1ec0f400b90346cb71bf99950~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776617619&x-signature=95U1IQwC0yAialmXT1typT6UHYM%3D","user_id":"3183810831459415","user_name":"睡仙参"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"3183810831459415","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":true,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"author_level_1","intro":"{"title_name":"作家Lv.1","title_id":"author_level_1"}","is_author_title":true,"is_vip_title":false,"label":"{"title_text":"作家Lv.1","title_default_color":"#FFFFFF","title_dark_color":"#FFFFFF","bg_default_color":"{\"start\":\"#FF9F31\",\"end\":\"#FFB95C\"}","bg_dark_color":"{\"start\":\"#CC8029\",\"end\":\"#CC9349\"}","title_dark_diaphaneity":"CC"}","zh_title":"作家Lv.1"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7092011333645765665","book_info":{"abstract":"【多世界女尊文，男主身娇体柔易推倒】
